services.title: Twelve specialties, one philosophy of care.
services.subtitle: From preventive check-ups to advanced implantology, every treatment is delivered with the same boutique standards across our three clinics.
services.askHint: Or open Sofia in the corner to ask any question about this treatment.

team.title: Specialists who listen first.
team.subtitle: Eleven clinicians across Roma, Palma and London — same protocols, same care philosophy.

contact.title: Speak with our team.
contact.body: You can reach us by phone, email or directly through Sofia, our AI assistant.

imprint.title: Imprint
imprint.body: DentalIA is a demonstration brand operated by Follow The Flow AI LLC, a Delaware limited liability company. The clinics, treatments and team profiles shown on this site are fictional and exist purely to illustrate AI automation capabilities.

privacy.title: Privacy notice
privacy.body: Because DentalIA is a public demo, no real visitor data is collected, stored or shared. The full privacy policy will be published with any production launch by a real dental clinic adopting this platform.

terms.title: Terms of use
terms.body: All services, clinics and team members presented on this site are demonstrations and do not correspond to real medical providers. No real medical service is offered. Full terms will accompany any production rollout.

home.heroSubtitle: Three boutique clinics, twelve specialties and Sofia, our AI assistant, ready to answer questions and book your visit at any time.
home.servicesBody: Browse our full catalogue or talk to Sofia for guided recommendations.
home.clinicsBody: From Prati in Rome to Santa Catalina in Palma and Marylebone in London, every clinic is a renovated heritage building reimagined as a calm, welcoming space.
home.teamTitle: Specialists who listen first, then treat.
home.teamBody: Implantologists, orthodontists, periodontists, hygienists and a dedicated pediatric team. Eleven professionals across three cities, sharing the same protocols and the same care philosophy.
home.conciergeBody: Sofia is the voice assistant of DentalIA. She speaks Italian, Spanish and English, knows our twelve services and our three clinics in detail, and can check live availability and book your visit in a few seconds. Ask her anything, anytime, without filling forms.

valueProps.title: AI assistant always available
valueProps.body: Sofia answers questions about treatments, prices and slots in real time, in your language, 24 hours a day.

valueProps.title: Three boutique clinics: Roma, Palma, London
valueProps.body: Premium spaces designed to feel calm and welcoming, with the same standards of care in every city.

valueProps.title: Multilingual care team
valueProps.body: Our clinicians and front-desk teams speak Italian, Spanish and English, so you can be heard exactly the way you want.

valueProps.title: Transparent pricing on request
valueProps.body: A clear written quote before any treatment, with no surprises and the option to discuss payment plans.

meta.title: DentalIA — Boutique Dental Care, Powered by AI
meta.description: DentalIA: three boutique dental clinics in Roma, Palma de Mallorca and London. 12 specialties, an AI concierge always available, transparent pricing.

footer.tagline: DentalIA — Boutique dental care, powered by AI.
footer.credit: A Follow The Flow AI showcase.
footer.legalNote: DentalIA is a demonstration brand created by Follow The Flow AI to showcase AI automation for dental clinics. All clinics, treatments and team members shown on this site are fictitious and for illustrative purposes only.
